# link11waap_server_groups (Data Source)

Lists all server groups in a configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Server Groups Data Source

data "link11waap_config" "main" {}

data "link11waap_server_groups" "all" {
  config_id = data.link11waap_config.main.id
}

output "server_group_count" {
  value = length(data.link11waap_server_groups.all.server_groups)
}

output "server_group_names" {
  value = [for sg in data.link11waap_server_groups.all.server_groups : sg.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_id` (String) Configuration ID.

### Read-Only

- `server_groups` (Attributes List) List of server groups. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--server_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--server_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `server_groups`

Read-Only:

- `challenge_cookie_domain` (String)
- `client_certificate` (String)
- `client_certificate_mode` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `mobile_application_group` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `proxy_template` (String)
- `routing_profile` (String)
- `security_policy` (String)
- `server_names` (List of String)
- `ssl_certificate` (String)
